summary:
DIVINE VISIONS AND THE GREAT HARVEST: Brandon shares a direct spiritual encounter regarding a three-year window for a massive global harvest of souls before the end times. He emphasizes the urgency of drawing near to God rather than trying to escape the world through the rapture, noting that believers must actively evangelize to prevent billions from perishing. Brandon describes a past out-of-body experience where he witnessed the chaos and destruction of the tribulation period, reinforcing his conviction to occupy the land and win souls before the antichrist emerges to deceive the masses.

TRUMP LEGISLATION AND THE ILLUSORY ECONOMY: Brandon recounts a vision of President Trump, who appeared physically slimmer, signing new legislation resembling the Declaration of Independence with a golden quill. He foresees a temporary, superficial financial boom spanning 2025 and 2026, characterized by increased oil drilling and a thin layer of wealth. Brandon warns that this economic boost is akin to a pig with makeup and lacks a solid foundation, advising people to line their pockets quickly for the short term rather than trusting it as a permanent financial fix.

GLOBAL ALLIANCES AND THE BRICS SYSTEM: Brandon details a shifting geopolitical landscape where the Abrahamic covenant brings profound blessings to Israel, despite a storm of war crimes accusations surrounding Benjamin Netanyahu. He observes international power struggles as the BRICS nations, including Russia and China, court Venezuela and other countries for oil resources to undermine the US dollar. In response, Brandon envisions a financial merging where Canada and Mexico dissolve financial borders with the United States to create a unified economic lifeboat against the rising BRICS coalition, while Germany appears torn between Western and BRICS alliances.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon issues warnings about impending catastrophic events, specifically describing a vision of two major buildings in America exploding from the inside out on their upper floors. He also foresees significant earthquakes striking British Columbia and urges intense prayer concerning the upcoming 2026 Winter Olympics in Italy, indicating that serious, undisclosed events are tied to this global gathering.

POLITICAL STALEMATES AND JUDICIAL SHIFTS: Brandon predicts a politically divided landscape following the 2026 elections, forecasting that the Senate will turn blue and create a stalemate presidency for the remainder of Trump's term. He emphasizes the critical need to act quickly on legislation before this political deadlock occurs and urges believers to pray over key governor seats in states like Oklahoma to prevent a shift in power. Additionally, Brandon foresees an impending change of judges within the Supreme Court and calls for intercession against federal harassment.

ESCHATOLOGICAL TIMELINES AND SHEMITAH CYCLES: Brandon explores complex end-time timelines, focusing heavily on the Jewish Shemitah cycles originating from Israel's statehood in 1948. He posits that a new seven-year Shemitah cycle will begin in 2028, which he believes aligns with the start of the tribulation and Jacob's trouble. Brandon contrasts his perspective with other prophetic voices like Tom Horn, who predicts the Apophis asteroid will strike in 2029 during the mid-tribulation, ultimately reaffirming his stance that believers must remain grounded in the Holy Spirit's guidance rather than getting swept up in timeline disputes.

SPIRITUAL SURRENDER AND SALVATION INVITATION: Brandon issues a heartfelt call for personal repentance and total surrender to Jesus Christ, stressing that choosing eternal life is a critical, immediate decision. He guides listeners through a prayer of salvation, encouraging them to turn their backs on worldly distractions and fully embrace the Holy Ghost. Brandon advises new believers to seek out non-denominational churches, get water-baptized, and immerse themselves in daily Bible reading to prepare their hearts for the challenging spiritual realities ahead.
rawData: [September 03, 2025]-[A glimpse Into 2026 - something I am praying over]-[https://youtu.be/oBpaSk7EJGE]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again today. Well, I have my sweetheart again, every single time. I'm so thankful that you come on, babe. I told everybody last time whenever I did the video by myself, I missed you. Yesterday's video, I didn't have her, and I said, 'Man, this is rough without my babe here.' But I just want to tell everybody, this girl means a lot to me. She is my friend. When I did videos without her yesterday, I'm sure you all were thinking, 'Where's Diana at?' I'm like, 'Yeah, I agree. I'm glad to be a part.' Yep. So, we're here today and we have a word from the Lord that is about 2026 and the rest of 2025. And I'm going to tell you all, when we prayed for President Trump yesterday, the Lord said to me, he came to me. He said, 'Braden,' he came to me. He said, 'Braden, thank you.' I said, 'What?' Out of nowhere, I was just washing my hands. He said, 'Brandon, I just want to say thank you for bringing the people to pray today for President Trump. You're changing things.' And I said, 'Lord, of course.' Oh, wow. It took me off guard because of the way he said it, and I said, 'Well, of course, Lord.' But he said, 'I want to show you more that's coming and the decisions that need to be prayed over concerning Trump and the UN meeting in September. For this will be the make-or-break of the financial structure of America and what's coming. For those that bless Israel, I will bless, and those that curse Israel, I will curse.' And he said, 'You'll see in the days ahead the true blessing and the true cursing, for the seedtime and harvest is accelerating. And you will see those that stand with Israel. The Abrahamic covenant will come alive more than what you've ever seen before as an end-time sign and event. You need to hear this as an end-time sign. This will be a major end-time sign of God showing up and showing off for his people. Not for a government or a structure of Bibi, but for the people of Israel. And I don't believe in replacement theology, and obviously the Father doesn't either. But I just want to tell you all, I know a lot of people got upset about the rapture of the church, saying what's going to happen in September. But what's going to come in September is a time to remember, for it will be in a 24-hour period. Everything that you know will be changing. He said it's like the water going over the waterfall: the point of no return, and the birthing pains as labor pains upon a woman, so will it be. You're about to see an escalation of that where you can't get the epidural anymore. It's time to push. But everybody's like, 'No, we've got to get the epidural.' No, it's time to push. The baby's coming. And the Lord said, 'I've given you a three-year window for a major revival, for our greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before. I'm giving you this window to bring in the lost. Now help me. Will you help me with the harvest?' Now, I know a lot of people are ready to jump ship. And he told me, he said, 'There's a lot of people that are upset. They're ready to jump ship.' But he said, 'Brandon, if I come right now, there's billions that are going to hell. And I don't want that any man should perish, but all come to repentance. Regardless of whoever, prophet so-and-so, that's telling you he's coming on the 23rd, I don't want to be the bearer of bad news and the bubble buster here, but I'm trying to tell you it's time to draw near. It's not trying to escape; it's time to draw near. We're going to see some more, and the Lord is ready. He said, 'I'm standing at the door, but a great harvest of souls is about to come.' And people said, 'Well, the harvest of souls, Brandon, is going to happen after the rapture of the church.' Well, that sounds cocky. No, I'm telling you, I was there. The Lord took me out of my body. I went to the Tribulation. There was nobody harvesting. They were all flipping the Lord off and were upset and cussing and burning cars and acting crazy until the Antichrist stepped on the scene and said, 'Hey, I have a solution.' And it was several weeks, it looked like, from when I was with the Lord. I don't want to give a time frame, but it looked like everything was burning. Everybody was acting crazy because the prayer covering of the church for the first time was gone, and everybody was acting a fool. You think BLM—remember all the rioting and BLM and all the things that happened with that in the big cities, and people were rioting and going crazy back in 2020 or whatever it was—that is nothing compared to what I saw. Across the world, people are acting a fool and burning and looting and acting nuts during this time frame. Now, what I did see concerning 2026 and 2025, the Lord showed me the beginning of 2025–2026. An overview of a great financial outpouring: as we lined up with Israel, the blessing of this was evident. You could see the people that were blessed. Remember I saw a two-stranded cord whenever Trump lined up with Israel, this blessing like a Jonathan and a David relationship. And you will see the blessing of the Abrahamic covenant like we've never seen before come on the people of Israel. And as I saw this, I saw the fruit and the agriculture be blessed. I saw, 'Drill, baby, drill.' And I've said this before, but I'll say it again. I saw, 'Drill, baby, drill.' And as the oil derricks were pumping oil, I saw great oil in the Gulf. I saw great oil coming in America. But as I saw Benjamin, I saw a massive hurricane and he was in the eye of the storm, and there was a storm on all sides of Benjamin Netanyahu. And they were saying, 'We must... they were wanting to remove him. He has to be removed.' And I kept hearing in the storm, 'War crimes.' It was war crimes, and it was moving around, and all kinds of bad things that they were saying. As the storm was moving, it was saying words; I could hear it inside this storm. Canada was in trouble, parts of Europe are in trouble. I'm telling you all, even when it came to... the Lord showed me Trump and his health. And I don't know if he watches my videos or not, but sir, we just want to let you know we pray for you, President Trump, and I hope you watch our videos. I know I was told your son, Eric, does. So we pray. But we know in this vision, President Trump, going into the days ahead, looked like he was losing weight. And I told Diana, 'In the vision, he looked skinnier. He looked like he lost fifty pounds. He started looking skinnier in his face.' And I thought that was kind of interesting. So I was watching him, but he looked like he had a little pep in his step, but he was finishing it. As he blessed Israel, there was a blessing on him. And then I saw him going into the fall. I saw things changing. And then I got to January, and I saw a book that looked like the Declaration of Independence. That's the way it looked. It was a piece of parchment paper, a long scroll. Scroll. Mhm. But he had a golden quill pen with a feather. And he took that quill pen and he started writing new legislation on this concerning the United States of America, digital platforms, and things ahead for money. And all of a sudden, I saw oil derricks pumping and I heard him—you know how he always says, 'Drill, baby, drill'—I saw, 'Drill, baby, drill' again. And I saw great oil wealth. I'm talking wells opened up everywhere. This is what I saw coming. And I saw him filling out that piece of paper, but I saw 2026 was a year of a fix, going even into May. Jerome Powell, I saw he was no more, like it was time for him to be removed, right? I didn't see him directly, he had just disappeared, but I just knew there was something coming with the interest rates. Okay. So, I don't want to add to or take away from anything, but I'm just telling you what I see. May came and I saw a difference in the economy concerning May, June, July, going into the elections of 2026, concerning the Senate and the House and the governors trying to pump the economy to make it look amazing. Back at the beginning, I saw a gold layer upon the soil. And the Lord said, "I want you to pay attention." And Trump was looking at the gold soil. And he was going, "Man," he goes, "Look at everything I've done. It's great. You know, the gold foundation and everything's, you know, I'm making everything great again." He was bragging about everything how he does. But it was still a pig. As he was parading a pig, the foundation was thin. And the Lord said, "You cannot build a house upon it. It's not thick enough, but it's enough to land in your pockets full of gold." And I saw scooping this gold off of this little bit of a surface and lining your pockets as gallon pockets. You know how you can get really deep gallon pockets, those quart pockets, you know? Like in overalls, like those really big pockets that go down your thigh. And that's the way it was. And I had these big overalls, these pants on. They had huge pockets. And I was scooping up the gold and I was putting it in my pockets in the vision. And the Lord said, "Line your pockets full of gold for the season will not last very long. The wave will not last very long." Like he's warned us over and over again. It will be a season of wealth that will not last long. You cannot build a huge house on it. It's not a foundation, but it's enough to line your pockets. So line your pockets in this season. And I saw gold on there, like I said, and people were scooping it up, putting it in their pockets as quickly as possible, but it wasn't enough to build a house on it. A foundation wasn't thick enough. But Trump was parading a pig. A pig with makeup. A pig with makeup that looked really pretty, but in the end, it's still a pig. And as he was walking through and going all this, it was trying to boost the economy, boost it for the Republican party to win in November. That's what I was seeing, trying to boost it for this. But as it went, I saw blue up north, and I saw the Senate go blue, Democrat, and I saw it barely stayed in the House. Now, we can pray into this. I believe we can change things. This is why we have such—he's given it to us way in advance. But this is what I'm seeing at this time. I saw it go blue and the Lord said, "A stalemate presidency the rest of the term." He said, "You have four months and one year to get everything done in legislation that you can get done. You must act quickly, for a stalemate presidency will be the rest of the term." That's what I heard. You must act quickly for whatever laws you want to pass or whatever you can get done in this time frame, for a stalemate presidency will be at the second term—the rest of the two years, 2027, 2028. I saw a stalemate presidency like not getting anything past the Senate. And the Lord said, "You must pray for the governors' seats." This is very important. This is what I try to tell y'all about Oklahoma divided and all these things trying to go blue because right now we're red, but they are trying to go blue. Key states, this is very important, praying over. And then I saw SCOTUS. I saw a changing of judges in the days ahead. A changing of a judge in the days ahead. Something's about to happen. Changing of judges. And the Lord said concerning federal, pray into this for this harassment and the things concerning SCOTUS. And I saw changing. But I saw a financial blessing that was fake. It was a pig. But it will make enough to fill your pockets full of gold. And the Lord said it will be short-lived. That's what the Lord said in this. That's what I heard. Now, you may say, "Well, I don't believe anything about it." Well, it's not financial advice. This is just a vision. I'm telling you what I saw. I'm warning you of what I feel the Lord has told me. You say, "Well, I don't agree with that. We're in the rapture and we're out of here and we're not going to be here." Well, then, okay, then don't listen to the channel. But I'm trying to tell you what I feel like the Lord told me. And it's been very, very important what the Lord said to pray as I saw Russia and I saw Venezuela again. I saw battleships all around Venezuela and the Lord said this is more than drug trafficking. He's trying to cause a front to cause a pause in the BRICS system. So the BRICS, like I told you, was reaching out to Venezuela, to Cuba, to North Korea, to these other nations to build a strong BRICS, giving them an olive branch of peace, of saying, "Listen, you join up with us and we'll give you financial liberty out from underneath the United States sanctions. You join oil with us, you do business with us, and we'll give you a head seat at the BRICS table." So Trump knew this and he was saying, "No, we're going to put these battleships there. We're going to cause confusion. We're not going to let that happen," right? Taking down this guy, trying to cause confusion in Venezuela, trying to do this. But it was a front, trying to stop it to save face for the dollar for this season as Russia and China and all these others were trying to reach out to Venezuela for the oil because they needed oil economic resources to back the BRICS to make it stronger—oil with Venezuela, oil with Saudi Arabia, whoever they were trying to get, you know, in the Middle East, and trying to do all this stuff, trying to build the BRICS up. And so that was part of what I was seeing. And remember what I told you all, I saw Canada in the days ahead in a great financial shaking, but they would have to join up with America—not with borders of them becoming part of the 51st state, but financial borders. There were still physical borders. Canada was still Canada, but there were no financial borders. They joined with us financially and they became the 51st state financially, like no financial borders. We became—our currencies—they didn't have Canadian dollars anymore or American. We were all one money-wise. And it's what made it stronger because their economy was in trouble and that we became a lifeboat. And the same thing with Mexico. And I saw that they joined with us and we all became one unit, like it was with the BRICS, trying to back up the American economy. Same with Australia and Europe, trying to combat the BRICS. And Germany was double, and they were looking both ways. I remember they were looking towards the Western and they were looking toward the BRICS, like they were double-minded concerning of it. And I remember seeing this German prime minister, he was looking at America and he was looking at the BRICS like, "Which way do we want to go?" So, going back to the vision, and so I saw—this is whenever the Lord showed me about, remember I told you he was praying in the White House about Trump's ear. He was interceding. The darkness that was coming on America lifted above the trees. This was the plague, but he was skinnier in that vision. And I thought that was kind of interesting because he was showing me this, that he was losing weight in these visions. And I thought, "Well, praise God, our prayers are working. Maybe he's not eating Big Macs anymore." You know, like, I'm just saying, in the vision, he looked like he wasn't drinking Coke. I was like, "Well, praise the Lord. He's taking care of himself." You know, I'm coming with you; I'm going to exercise, too. And then, this is about America. I saw the buildings, two buildings again, exploding from the top up, from the inside out. They weren't coming from the inside in like 9/11 was, but this was something inside of the buildings. Two major buildings in America were exploding on the top, the upper floors, from the inside out. Massive explosions. And I saw glass and everything exploding and going all over the place. But I could feel the atmosphere again, and I thought that was interesting. I see these events, and the Lord showed me even with British Columbia again, I saw a major earthquake again in British Columbia. That's why I kept seeing this, and the Lord told me, 'This is going to happen. These major shakings are going to happen.' And he highlighted the Olympics in February, and it's in Italy, and he said, 'Pray over this. This is something you need to pray over. The Olympics in 2026. Pray over the Winter Olympics in Italy. It's something serious.' He hasn't shown me, and he said, 'I'll give you more to the puzzle as you go. I'll give you more. It's like taking a piece of the pie, and he gives you a little more and he gives you a little more whenever you're able to chew it because he doesn't want to give it all to you because you'd choke on it. He gives you a little bit more and a little bit more.' And I think it's amazing how the Lord talks to me. I say, 'Lord, thank you. Well, that's what I can have today. Okay, I'm appreciative.' But either way, Lord, we're going to keep praying this out. We're going to see what you have for us each and every single day. But as we pray into this, I saw, like I said, the Ronald Reagan face on Trump. I saw him excited about the golden street, saying, 'Oh, look at this.' You know how he talks, 'Praise him, I'm going to make America huge. It's going to be great.' You know, and he's so excited about the golden street. But the Lord said, 'Notice the foundation for the body of Christ is really thin there. It's not, you know, he's not making America great again; it's to make America have a time of, "Let's fill our pockets. Let's get ready."' Listen to him, listen to the Spirit of the Lord so that you know how to get through the days ahead. And people say, 'Well, I thought Kim Clement prophesied this and that.' Kim Clement saw a lot of darkness that he never spoke about because he was always telling you there was another side of it. Just like what he talked about Joseph; Kim Clement got into Joseph, and he said Joseph prepared for the storm so that he didn't have to go through the darkness. It wasn't for the body of Christ, and I agree with Kim Clement wholeheartedly. What I told you was coming is not for you. You are to be the salt and the light of all the darkness, all the shaking to awaken, and all the stuff that I've seen about the plague, the pestilence, the financial crisis, and all the tribulation stuff that I've seen coming—earthquakes in divers places. Ladies and gentlemen, we are the bride of Christ. We are the salt and light of this earth. We are the head and not the tail. We're above and not beneath. We'll go through and not go under. That's what the Bible says, and I line up with the word of God. I told Diana, 'We will not participate in financial destitution; we've lived that, and I know I'm not going back down that road.' So I'm asking the Father already, 'Babe, let's pray. Let's pray into this, that we are in the right place at the right time doing exactly what the Lord has asked us to do, that we are hearing what he's saying so that we can get what is out of his hand.' I don't want to be a person that's in the middle of Sodom and Gomorrah going, 'You know what? I like it over here too much, and I'm not hearing what's coming.' And many of you all are so close to Sodom and Gomorrah, you don't know what's coming. And I'm thankful that you're here, but like I said, there's so much static in the atmosphere with prophet so-and-so saying this and prophet so-and-so saying that, and you're going, 'Well, Brandon, you said that. How?' and you're trying to copy the word. Folks, if you realize, I ain't trying to toot my own horn. I said it months ago, and you're hearing it from them, and you're saying, 'He's the original voice.' No, no, no. The original voice started with us, and it's usually copied. But I don't point it out. I just keep going because it's not maturity to do that, to go, 'Well, you know, they're copying.' Just grow up, who cares? But I'm going to tell you, stay on the vine, hear God for yourself. Bottom line: you don't need me, you don't need them, you need God. And who's saying it first, who cares? It's about Jesus. That's what he told me. He said, 'Brandon, don't lose track of all that stuff. Just keep close to me. All this other stuff will work itself out.' Who's saying what, he's already told you all that. There's a lot of static in the air and there's a lot of all this weirdness, flakiness—'We're going home, we're doing this.' I'm like, 'No, just focus on the task at hand.' You know why I'm not worried about the rapture of the church? Because I occupy until he comes. I'm too busy occupying. I'm too busy trying to take the land for Jesus. I'm not worried about the rapture. You know why? Because I believe I qualify; my lamp's full of oil. Stay ready. I'm staying ready every day. I'm looking for it. Diana and I are looking for him. We're looking up like this and we say, 'Hey babe, let's pray today.' We're looking up, we're taking communion, and we're seeking him as a family. And I'm not worried about when he's coming. I'm just doing everything I can to catch all the people I can around me on fire for him so that their vessels are full, too. But if you're always looking up and not helping those around you, what are we here for? 'We're rapture-bound, we're out of here, God come and get us.' And we're always looking up, but you have all these people dying and going to hell, all of them. And that's why I try to tell you all every single time when we come on here: you need to get your heart right before Jesus Christ because I'm staying vertical. I keep my eyes on him. I don't go horizontal, looking at when is the rapture coming. It doesn't matter. I occupy until he comes. My heart's longing for him. I've been on the other side; I've seen what he has for us. I've had amazing visitations of heaven, but I'm telling you, it's not my focus. My focus is the job at hand: to bring in the lost as quickly as I can because they're going to burn in hell. And what's most precious to him is precious to me—the soul of man. What's precious to him is to see that none should perish, that all come to repentance. And all the other stuff is going to work itself out because I'm keeping my eyes on him. The rapture of the church can happen whenever it needs to happen, but right now, I'm focused on the task at hand. I'm not worried about my problems or overcoming or Megan or anything. I'm focused on just getting as many of you all saved that I can, to tell them that Jesus Christ is coming and you need to repent so that you don't burn in hell for eternity. Do you understand? All the other stuff is not important. The most important thing is that we all know that he is coming. We can agree on that, but on timing we might differ, and we can say, 'Is there a reverse rapture?' and all this. I never even heard where it is; I don't know about all this stuff. There are so many people with so many different—'Well, so-and-so said this, there's a reverse rapture, there's a major 9/11 event and all these people are going to die' and all this stuff. You can pick anything in the scripture you want to and try to twist it the way you want to make it sound. I'm going to tell you this: I'm going to stay grounded, and I'm going to keep getting people saved, and I'm not trying to come up with some crazy theology. I don't care. I just stay on the Word, telling you that Jesus Christ, in the Great Commission, to go into all the world, lay hands on the sick, cast out devils, raise the dead, to bring sight to the blind, to do everything the Lord told me I could do by His Word, and not get off in la-la land. Stay grounded in these last days, because you're going to get swayed by a lot of voices. Well, this prophet said there's no more financial blessing, and if you invest in this, you're going to lose everything. I don't care what they say. You know what? I care about what He says. And I listen to Him and I say, "Babe, does that witness with you?" Ah, don't listen to me. Okay. Well, let's pray some more until we know that we're hearing, because you don't get off in la-la land, especially when we pray. Pray as a family. We take communion. We believe God that He's going to teach us and guide us into all things. And if we miss it, and you fall down and skin your knee, then you pick yourself up and say, "Man, that hurt a little bit, but God, I'm still focused on You." Folks, when you miss it, you don't go, "Well, I'll quit." No, you just keep brushing your knees off, pick your bicycle up, and you keep riding. You keep on, keep on. But I'm telling you, there's a lot of spiritual weirdness out there right now with all this different stuff going on. And well, "I don't know who to believe." I hear that a lot. "I don't know who to believe." Well, go with your peace. That's a good one. And don't listen to me, don't listen to him. What does your peace say? What do you feel the Holy Ghost telling you? And even Diana, we were talking about making a big decision about something. And it's not the answer that I wanted, but I said, "Okay, let's pray in the Spirit together." So, I grabbed her hand and we were praying, and she goes, "What do you hear?" And I told her what I heard. And I said, "What do you hear?" She goes like this. I said, "It's not what I wanted to hear, and it's not what my spirit wanted, but it's what I have peace about. So go with that." Even if my flesh didn't want to hear what I felt like the Holy Spirit just told me, because that's not the answer that I wanted, because sometimes you already have an answer in your mind of what you think you want the Spirit of God to tell you, and you've already made up your mind. So you're already decided in your flesh. So you bypass the Spirit of God, what He's trying to tell you in your heart. And so you're not going to hear the Spirit of God because you so desperately want what you want. And it's not going to work that way. He'll tell you things that your flesh doesn't like. "Brandon, lose weight." I don't like that. "Okay, Brandon, you do this." And I'm like, okay. "Brandon, stop texting people. Stop calling people. Brandon, you need to do this." And I go, okay. So, I've done that in the past. It's hard sometimes when you're social. I butterfly about things. You want to talk to folks and the Lord says, "Brandon, I don't want you to do that anymore." Okay? You know, just me, and I'm just being real with you all. But it takes being obedient and willing and saying, "God, I'll eat the fruit of the land, regardless if my flesh likes it or not. When You correct me, I want to have ears to hear and a heart to receive what the Spirit is saying, even if my flesh doesn't like it." "Brandon, I want you to stay at this job and clean bathrooms." That's not You. That's the devil. "Get thee behind me, Satan." And that's what you say. "But surely that's not God." Year after year, 15 years. And you go, "Lord, is that You still?" "Yes, it is. Keep going." "I want you to stay in this shotgun house for all these years." 22 years in a shotgun house with barely 800 square feet, with holes in the floor, with a leaky roof, pouring water when it rains, mold growing. It was terrible. 22 years doing it. And you sit there and go, "God, can we leave?" "No. Take care of this, do this." And you go, "Lord, this cannot be You." And the Lord said, "What do you feel, babe?" She goes, "I feel like the Lord says we're supposed to stay here 22 years." And you sit there and go, "Lord, this doesn't make any sense. Help me with my leaky roof. Help me with this." And finally, He sends you a blessing and says, "It's time to move." Do you understand? It's not always what your flesh wants to hear when He tells you to do something. Sometimes it makes your flesh squirm, but it's being obedient and following that peace that passes all understanding. And I'm telling you, Jesus, I'm sure when God said, "You're going to have to die on that cross, Son, and you're going to have to suffer for all these people, and it's going to be probably the worst thing that you ever could imagine, but I need you to do it."
